heading: FALSIFICATION OF RECORDS; REPORT
operative_text: When, in the opinion of the agency's director of school audits, audits or reviews of accounting, enrollment, or other records of a school district reveal deliberate falsification of the records, or violation of the provisions of this chapter, through which the district's share of state funds allocated under the authority of this chapter would be, or has been, illegally increased, the director shall promptly and fully report the fact to the State Board of Education, the state auditor, and the appropriate county attorney, district attorney, or criminal district attorney.
_note: No cross-references or defined terms explicitly stated in the operative text. The phrase 'this chapter' refers to Chapter 48 of the Education Code but is not a formal cross-reference citation.
